data.title: Amazon's 1st Kuiper Satellite Launch Scrubbed Due to Tech Glitch, Bad Weather
data.description: Amazon's Kuiper satellite launch was scrubbed due to bad weather. This setback delays the company's plans for space-based internet service.

data.title: Bitcoin Could Break Free From Stocks In Case Of A Tariff-Fueled Recession, Says Analyst: 'Lower Interest Rates And Massive Money Printing'
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) may have become increasingly correlated with stocks amid escalating trade war concerns, but an analyst predicted that a deteriorating economic environment will eventually decouple the apex cryptocurrency from the risk-on sector.

data.title: Trump's NASA Nominee Jared Isaacman Tells Senate 'We Will Prioritize Sending American Astronauts to Mars'
data.description: Jared Isaacman, nominated as NASA chief, vowed to prioritize sending American astronauts to Mars, echoing President Trump's vision.

data.title: Americans Could Pay 50% More For Bicycles As Trump's Tariffs Hit China-Dependent Industry: Report
data.description: Amid rising tensions in the U.S.-China trade war, American consumers are facing the prospect of steep bicycle price hikes.

data.title: MSFT Stock Had A Rough Ride Past Year And The Satya Nadella-Led Company Is Now Reportedly Mulling More Job Cuts — This Time Focused On Managers And Non-Coders
data.description: In a bid to bolster the coder-to-manager ratio, Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ: MSFT) is reportedly contemplating another wave of job cuts, primarily targeting middle managers and non-coders.
